nation: Conseil de la Première Nation des Innus Essipit
one_time_description: Règlement de revendications particulières (specific claims settlement) of $19,230,096 recorded in prior year 2020; also annulation d'un emprunt de $14,104,493 (dont $4,901,185 déjà comptabilisé au passif) en 2021
economic_notes: Nation operates crab fishing, retail sales, community housing, outfitters, excursions, camping via controlled subsidiaries. Equity-method enterprises include Namunashu s.e.c. (50%), Pêcheries Nikan S.E.C. (50%), Groupe Umek s.e.c. (23.33%), Groupe Namesh S.E.C. (50.9%), Granulco inc. (25%), Rénovations J.M.B.R. inc. (50%). Wind energy project Parc éolien Rivière-du-Moulin royalties up to $446,250/year. Hydroelectric project participation (Dérivation rivière Portneuf) to 2053. Letter of credit $350,000 issued to Hydro-Québec Distribution.
notes: QUALIFIED AUDIT OPINION on multiple grounds: (1) GBEs (Camping Tadoussac, Les Croisières Essipit, Hébergement Essipit, Mer et Monde Écotours) consolidated by full consolidation instead of modified equity method per PSAS; (2) intangible assets capitalized contrary to PSAS; (3) annulation d'un emprunt de $14,104,493 (only $4,901,185 was recorded as liability) — prior year surplus understated by $9,203,308; (4) unspent contribution funds of $3,417,780 not recorded as liabilities; (5) infrastructure (dam) received as contribution not valued at fair value. Fiscal year is March 31, 2021. French-language statements. Prior year 2020 included extraordinary settlement of specific claims ($19,230,096) and radiation of loan ($4,901,185). The osr calculation includes quote-part des résultats nets des entreprises commerciales and economic activities revenue. Annual debt service includes only principal repayments on long-term debt ($567,632); lease obligation repayments were $118,807 additional. No remuneration schedule found in the extracted text.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
